libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No Docker service or environment/system property setup is indicated. Prefer in-memory/unit tests using fake or minimal HttpServletRequest/HttpServletResponse implementations and XML/WebDAV model objects rather than starting a servlet container or Jackrabbit repository.

deterministic_setup.reason:
The org.apache.jackrabbit:jackrabbit-webdav:2.0-beta4 POM declares javax.servlet:servlet-api as provided, and classes such as AbstractWebdavServlet, WebdavRequestImpl, WebdavResponseImpl, InputContextImpl, OutputContextImpl, and header helpers reference javax.servlet/javax.servlet.http APIs. input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8851 [Automation] native-image run fails for org.apache.jackrabbit:jackrabbit-webdav:2.0-beta4; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The reported native-image run failures appear to include behavior/assertion differences in existing locator tests for 2.0-beta4, which deterministic setup will not fix.
A servlet API version newer than 2.3 is likely compatible, and the existing 1.5.0 test scaffold uses 2.4, but 2.3 matches the resolved 2.0-beta4 parent POM.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Jackrabbit WebDAV declares the Servlet API as a provided dependency, but many public classes expose or extend javax.servlet types, so meaningful unit coverage needs the Servlet API on the test classpath.
